title: Scaffold in Flutter
content:
### Scaffold Widget

`Scaffold` implements the basic Material Design visual layout structure. It provides a framework for AppBar, Drawer, BottomNavigationBar, FloatingActionButton, and more.

```dart
Scaffold(
  appBar: AppBar(
    title: const Text('My App'),
    actions: [
      IconButton(
        icon: const Icon(Icons.settings),
        onPressed: () {},
      ),
    ],
  ),
  body: const Center(
    child: Text('Content goes here'),
  ),
  floatingActionButton: FloatingActionButton(
    onPressed: () {},
    child: const Icon(Icons.add),
  ),
)
```

### Scaffold Properties

| Property | Type | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| `appBar` | `PreferredSizeWidget?` | Top app bar |
| `body` | `Widget?` | Main content area |
| `floatingActionButton` | `Widget?` | FAB button |
| `drawer` | `Widget?` | Side drawer |
| `bottomNavigationBar` | `Widget?` | Bottom nav bar |
| `bottomSheet` | `Widget?` | Persistent bottom sheet |
| `backgroundColor` | `Color?` | Background color |

### AppBar

```dart
AppBar(
  title: const Text('Title'),
  leading: const Icon(Icons.menu),
  actions: [
    IconButton(icon: const Icon(Icons.search), onPressed: () {}),
    IconButton(icon: const Icon(Icons.more_vert), onPressed: () {}),
  ],
  backgroundColor: Colors.blue,
  elevation: 2,
)
```

### Drawer and BottomNavigationBar

```dart
Scaffold(
  drawer: Drawer(
    child: ListView(
      children: [
        const DrawerHeader(
          child: Text('Menu'),
        ),
        ListTile(
          leading: const Icon(Icons.home),
          title: const Text('Home'),
          onTap: () {},
        ),
      ],
    ),
  ),
  bottomNavigationBar: BottomNavigationBar(
    items: const [
      BottomNavigationBarItem(icon: Icon(Icons.home), label: 'Home'),
      BottomNavigationBarItem(icon: Icon(Icons.search), label: 'Search'),
      BottomNavigationBarItem(icon: Icon(Icons.person), label: 'Profile'),
    ],
  ),
)
```

> **Key Point:** Scaffold provides the default Material Design layout. It automatically handles keyboard insets, safe areas, and back button navigation.

quiz.question: Which widget provides Material Design layout structure?
What property of Scaffold shows a bottom navigation bar?
